title: Video demonstrating dynamic calibration procedure
author: Wozniak Mikolaj
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Video recording shows dynamic calibration procedure, developed in the frameworks of ComTraForce project. The calibration was performed at the facilities of RISE Research Institutes of Sweden.
steps_raw: Video recording shows dynamic calibration procedure, developed in the frameworks of ComTraForce project. The calibration was performed at the facilities of RISE Research Institutes of Sweden.
